description: 196 - 25-04-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

participants.name: Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

text:
Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Oliver Robbinst/Personal

Sent: Fri 25/04/2025 1:26:26 PM (UTC)

To: Peter MandelsonPersonal

Subject: RE: OFFSEN: DRAFT READOUT OF USTR AND COMMERCE MEETINGS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
thanks

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: 25 April 2025 11:45
To: Oliver Robbins
Subject: Fw: OFFSEN: DRAFT READOUT OF USTR AND COMMERCE MEETINGS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

FYI
Get Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

From: JCS Personal
Sent: Thursday, April 24, 2025 11:12:20 PM
To: Peter Mandelson Personal

Cc: Mungo Woodifield Personal
Personal : JCS Personal

Subject: FW: OFFSEN: DRAFT READOUT OF USTR AND COMMERCE MEETINGS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Peter — below is a rough written readout of today’s meetings.
Mungo will write down key points for you with the CX separately before your meeting.

JCS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
Jcs Personal

From:

Sent: Thursday, April 24, 2025 11:11 PM

To: VChandraPersonal : Jonathan Black (Cabinet Office) (External)
Personal ; Kate JOSEPH (DBT)

rersonal ; Graham Floater (DBT)
rersonal

Cc: Mungo Woodifield "e!sona!
Subject: OFFSEN: DRAFT READOUT OF USTR AND COMMERCE MEETINGS
USTR

A positive and productive discussion was held with we

COMMERCE
Both sides agreed to follow-up on actions and next steps quickly: UK would mark up the text 
with its written comments and propose alternative/original wording.
ENDS
***
565
